title: New AI image generator BEATS EVERYTHING
summary: YouTube review comparing ChatGPT Images 2.0 to Nano Banana across diverse image generation tasks including posters, UI design, diagrams, animation, and spatial reasoning. The channel concludes that ChatGPT Images 2.0 beats existing alternatives in capability.
